publishedAbstract: - OCS pods are stuck in pending state with the below error: $ oc describe pod-n openshift-storage ~~~ Type Reason Age From Message------------------------- Warning FailedScheduling 87s default-scheduler 0/6 nodes are available: 3 node(s) had untolerated taint {node-role.kubernetes.io/master:}, 3 node(s) had untolerated taint {node.ocs.openshift.io/storage:}. preemption: 0/6 nodes are available: 6 Preemption is not helpful for scheduling ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF taint is not tolerated by pods, causing ODF pods to go into a Pending state
